text_original: real talk real feeling great to write a story and have the person dialog so authentic.
text_zh: 大实话，真情实感。写一个故事，能让角色对话如此真实，感觉太棒了。
reply_original: Thank you so much! Hearing that the dialogues feel so authentic and real to you is the best compliment we could receive. We love being the canvas for your stories. If you ever have suggestions or need assistance, feel free to contact us at support@fantachat.ai. Keep creating those amazing memories!
reply_zh: 非常感谢！听到你觉得对话如此真实自然，是对我们最好的褒奖。我们很乐意成为你故事的画布。如果你有任何建议或需要帮助，请随时通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们。继续创造那些精彩的回忆吧！
